content:
Researchers, academics, legal professionals, policy makers, and technology experts are invited to contribute to an edited book titled:
“Transforming Forensics with AI: Criminal Investigations, Policy and Ethical Dilemmas”
This book aims to explore the role of Artificial Intelligence in forensic science and criminal justice, with a focus on legal, ethical, social, and policy implications.

Abstract submission deadline: 30 June 2026
Expected publication: December 2026

We welcome original contributions and look forward to meaningful academic engagement on this important and timely topic.
comment: One challenge that deserves attention is evidentiary transparency. If an AI-assisted forensic conclusion can't be independently explained and reproduced in court, its investigative value may not translate into legal admissibility.
